message:
feat(ffs-core): FsOps impl for OpenFs + symlink reading (bd-1q6)

Implement the FsOps trait for OpenFs, bridging device-based ext4
operations to the FUSE/harness VFS interface. All five FsOps methods
(getattr, lookup, readdir, read, readlink) delegate to the existing
OpenFs device-based helpers.

Also adds OpenFs::read_symlink() supporting both fast (inline) and
slow (extent-mapped) symlinks.

6 new tests exercising FsOps via dyn trait object: getattr, lookup,
lookup-not-found, readdir with pagination, read, read-directory-rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
